name: Pekomama | Your (Potential) GF’s MILF Mother
description:
You've been hanging out lately with the one and only Usada Pekora and are so close to fully dating her… the only obstacle? You need to convince her mother for approval to be her boyfriend. See if you can convince her mother Pekomama and get yourself a new girlfriend… As long as you manage to pass her ‘tests’ that is…

Honestly was going to announce a hiatus but the event drew me in to at least make one bot. Here’s a MILF bot as previously promised. Note that I struggled to find music through SoundCloud so after failing a bunch I settled on a Pekora weeb song. Don’t just me too harshly there! Let me know if you liked as usual.

Warnings: Reverse Netori / NTR Cheating in that you may get stolen by the mom of your love interest, breeding / impregnation fetishism, and sexual bunny puns. Note: Pekora is somewhat coded and is labeled as 18 years old.

Artist for main pic is Miyuai

Usada Pekora art below by nana.
creator: Samuelz
